violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Shredded cheese found on the floor of the walk-in cooler. Food should be stored at least 6 inches off the floor.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Cheese was found on the floor of the walk-in cooler during inspection. Food items should be stored off of the floor.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Deodorant was found on the counter next to the air fryer during inspection. Personal items should be stored separated from food and food preparation areas.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
